mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_WAS_EXEC_BATCH WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId} AND INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId}
mapper.sql: web.BATCH_APP_ID AS batchAppId, web.INSTANCE_ID AS instanceId, web.USE_YN AS useYn, web.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, web.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, wi.INSTANCE_NAME AS instanceName, wi.INSTANCE_DESC AS instanceDesc, wi.IP AS ip, wi.PORT AS port, wi.INSTANCE_TYPE AS instanceType
FROM FWK_WAS_EXEC_BATCH web LEFT JOIN FWK_WAS_INSTANCE wi ON web.INSTANCE_ID = wi.INSTANCE_ID
mapper.select: SELECT INSTANCE_ID FROM FWK_WAS_EXEC_BATCH WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
